calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Rodney M. Sweet 925-284-1025, for Plaintiff D'Arcy & Hart Construction, Inc. the moving party.
Attorney Gregory Haines 415-546-0771, for Defendant Sally L. Liu the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of PLAINTIFF D'ARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC., JOHN BRITTON, EDWARD BERMAN's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief. The Court rules as follows. The Order for Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief is signed, but will be STAYED for One (1) month until July 21, 2016. If escrow closes and Plaintiffs are paid in full the matter is off calendar. See scanned document for amounts for the undertaking. Mr. Haines orally request for a continuance to file opposition; the Court denies his request. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Notice And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Off Calendar

Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF D'ARCY & HARTY CONSTRUCTION, INC., JOHN BRITTON, EDWARD BERMAN Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Injunctive Relief
is OFF CALENDAR per CCP 1005 and 1013. This motion was filed on April 6, 2016; it was served by mail on April 4, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
